description_long: This is a modern, industrial-style shelving unit featuring three long, rectangular wooden shelves supported by four robust, metallic vertical frames at each corner. The shelves are made of a medium-brown wood with a natural grain pattern, and two of the shelves each have a single rectangular drawer with a lighter, weathered wood finish and a small metallic handle. The drawers are offset from each other, providing a visually interesting asymmetry. The metallic supports are a matte gray, contrasting with the warm wood tones and adding structural stability. The open design allows for easy access from both the front and back, making it suitable for use as a room divider or storage/display unit in urban environments such as lofts, garages, or public spaces.
description: A modern, industrial shelving unit with three wooden shelves, two offset light-wood drawers, and sturdy gray metal supports. The open design and mixed wood tones give it a functional yet stylish appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing three wooden shelves, two offset light-wood drawers with handles, and gray metal supports at the corners.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the shelves and the thickness of the wooden planks, with metal supports visible at the edges.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the shelves and drawers, with the same offset drawer arrangement and metal supports.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the shelf depth and metal supports.
